body:
## Listing
- Title: PhD scholarship in Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models
- Organization: DTU Compute
- Location: Kgs. Lyngby
- Link: https://efzu.fa.em2.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_2001/job/7592/

## Why it looked like a fit
PhD project on uncertainty quantification methods for large language models. Strong match for ML research, probabilistic modelling, and trustworthy AI interests in a serious Copenhagen-area research environment.

## User signal

## Suggested next step
Prepare a PhD-focused research fit note around uncertainty, LLM evaluation, probabilistic modelling, and trustworthy AI.
